memo_title: Tenacious Conversion Engine — Act V Evidence Graph
author: Gashaw Bekele

C01.claim: Simulation baseline pass@1 = 0.453 (95% CI [0.424, 0.483]) over 30 dev-slice tasks, 5 trials

C02.claim: Real LLM pass@1 = 0.967 on dev slice using claude-sonnet-4-6 via OpenRouter
C02.notes: 150 real LLM calls (30 tasks × 5 trials), keyword-grounded response check

C03.claim: Real LLM pass@1 = 0.960 (95% CI [0.948, 0.972]) on dev slice — Act IV final run
C03.notes: Reflects natural LLM variability at temperature=0.3

C04.claim: Held-out slice pass@1 = 1.0 using claude-sonnet-4-6 via OpenRouter
C04.notes: Real LLM calls on held-out tasks

C05.claim: Kill switch routes ALL synthetic prospects to staff sink (is_sink=true)

C06.claim: Kill switch routes real prospects to staff sink when TENACIOUS_LIVE is unset

C07.claim: Prospect prospect_001 (Nimbus Ledger Inc.) classified as Segment 1 with confidence 0.9
C07.notes: Series B $14M on 2026-02-12; 11 open eng roles; enriched via crunchbase+job posts

C08.claim: Prospect prospect_002 (Glenmark Commerce) classified as Segment 2

C09.claim: Prospect prospect_003 (Aurelia Health) classified as Segment 3

C10.claim: Invalid prospect ID returns graceful error (unknown_crunchbase_id), not exception
C10.notes: Tested with INVALID_ID; pipeline returns structured error JSON

C13.claim: Voice-agent conversational pass@1 ceiling: ~42% (τ²-Bench leaderboard Feb 2026)
C13.notes: Published reference ceiling; simulation baseline_p=0.40 derived from this

C14.claim: 36 engineers on bench; 26 on paid engagements; 7-14 day deploy time

C15.claim: FastAPI server starts successfully; /healthz returns 200 OK with tenacious_live=false
